idea-plugin.name: Claude Sessions
idea-plugin.description:
Shows exactly what Claude Code changed in a session — never mixed up with your own uncommitted edits.
  • Claude Sessions tool window: browse sessions for the current project as cards (title, date, files changed)
  • Per-file change list with +/- line stats, Keep/Reject buttons, color-coded new/deleted files
  • Native multi-file diff view for a session, with Prev/Next to cycle through every touched file
  • Inline Keep/Reject review for the latest session, directly in the editor — GitHub Copilot-style struck-through removed lines and highlighted added lines, not just a diff popup
  • Detects files deleted via Bash rm, not just Edit/Write/NotebookEdit
Independent of git — works even on files with no baseline in version control.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 0.2.9: pinning an older session no longer shows a newer session's hunks mixed in inline (or hides the file outright) — replays the pinned session's own edits and remaps them onto the live document, dropping only the specific hunks a later edit actually collides with; the `git` subprocess checks for untracked/no-VCS files are now native ChangeListManager/ ProjectLevelVcsManager lookups instead (no subprocess, no custom cache needed)
  • 0.2.8: inline word-diff colors reworked to match IntelliJ's native diff popup exactly (colors picked from the real thing): grey wash/emphasis for old/removed content, green for new/added, a gutter strip on the live line, and a caret marker for pure insertion points; word-level highlighting now falls back to whole-line when most of the line changed anyway
  • 0.2.7: single-line edits now render as an inline word-diff (changed word highlighted, old word struck through right next to it) instead of a whole-line ghost block; warns when a file's diff also includes a later session's changes, instead of silently mixing them
  • 0.2.6: plugin ID changed to com.ahmedalazaizeh.sessiondiff (was com.progressoft.sessiondiff)
  • 0.2.5: fixed IDE lag from this plugin's polling (disk/git work off the EDT, cached transcript scans, memoized git checks); dismissed sessions/files now reappear once actually touched again instead of staying hidden forever; fixed inline markers and the file list rebuilding on every poll tick even with no changes; auto-hide a file once fully reviewed
  • 0.2.4: fixed a crash in "Clear All Sessions" when a touched path was actually a directory
  • 0.2.3: fixed the tool window stripe icon losing its "+" mark when active/selected; require restart on plugin install/update/uninstall
  • 0.2.2: "Clear All Sessions" button, with confirmation before auto-accepting any unreviewed changes; custom tool window stripe icon
  • 0.2.1: support 2026.2 (262.*)
  • 0.2.0: inline Copilot-style Keep/Reject review in the editor, file-list Keep/Reject buttons, Bash-delete detection, multi-file diff tab with auto-advance on reject
  • 0.1.0: session cards with titles, per-file diff stats, native diff viewer, inline gutter markers with Rollback for the latest session
